title: Shogun Kurozane — Ruler, Oni Armor, and Blood-Fueled Demon Mode
productionStatus: approved review source; not a pixel-authored runtime asset

generator.mode: generate with character and historical portrait references

revision.replacesForFutureDerivation: The v2 concept remains historical evidence, but v3 is the preferred facial and transformation reference.
goals: Replace the residual Western-esque face with an original face grounded in Momoyama and early-Edo Japanese portrait conventions.
Make a broad, strongly projecting fleshy nose, hooded eyes, full cheek plane, pronounced ears, and period hairline stable identity anchors.
Add a blood-fueled Demon Mode that visibly transforms the same man inside the same Oni armor.

states.read: Sad elderly Japanese vampire statesman in repaired early-Edo formal layers, resting one hand on the closed state-seal case.
Human-scale Kurozane in black-lacquer early-17th-century gusoku, horned kawari-kabuto, and Oni menpo.
The same armored body distended from within: fused menpo, opened lacquer seams, blood-lit lacing, streaming gray hair, claws, and black-bell resonance.

identityContract.face: Original elderly Japanese man with a broad projecting fleshy nose, low root, wide bridge, rounded tip and alae, heavy-lidded almond eyes, epicanthic folds, full cheeks, large ears, age jowls, thin moustache, and wispy chin beard.
identityContract.hair: Period shaved forecrown and gray chonmage in human states; old gray hair streams from the shikoro in Demon Mode.

visualReferences.role: character, armor, palette, and mood continuity

visualReferences.title: Portrait of Kano Tan'yu
visualReferences.role: Japanese period portrait conventions and facial anatomy only; sitter identity not copied

visualReferences.title: Portrait of a Warrior
visualReferences.role: Momoyama warrior portrait conventions, hairline, eyes, beard, and formal presence only; sitter identity not copied

constraints: No resemblance to Peter Cushing, Grand Moff Tarkin, or another real actor
No Western or Eurasian facial structure
No authentic clan mon or imperial chrysanthemum
No copied historical crest, sitter, painting composition, or mask
No wings, extra arms, graphic gore, text, logo, or watermark
nextProductionStep: Derive the v3 face into a boss portrait expression row, then author human-to-demon transition keys and separate combat silhouettes under a fixed sprite geometry contract.
